repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Association of State Universities and Land-Grant Colleges

did.abstract: Includes printed and photocopied material, and other papers relating to Personius' work.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of food and nutrition, Cornell University.

Catherine Personius graduated from Elmira College in 1925 with a degree in home economics and chemistry, subsequently joining the staff as foods instructor. In 1928, she completed her M.A. at Teacher's College, Columbia University and in 1937 her Ph.D. from Cornell, joining the faculty as an assistant professor that same year. From 1940-1943, she was an associate professor at the University of Wisconsin, Madison, and then returned to Cornell as professor and co-chair of the Department of Food and Nutrition and a year later as chair. In 1947, she also became Coordinator of Research for the College and Assistant Director of the Experiment Station. Personius was the first woman to be a faculty representative on the Board of Trustees where she served from 1959-1964. She retired in 1966.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes printed and photocopied material, and other papers relating to Personius' work as a teacher and researcher in home economics, especially relating to her field of food and nutrition and with the Association of State Universities and Land-Grant Colleges.

emph.ref: Series III. Subject and Reference Files
Series IV. Cornell Committees, Events, Projects, Research
Series V. Outside Associations and Organizations
Series VI. American Home Economics Association (AHEA)
Series VII. Association of State Universities and Land-Grant Colleges (ASULGC)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Catherine Jane Personius papers, #23-14-979. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
